title: MIN 714 (M) Amendment 1 proposed implementation of MLC 2006, amendments 2022
body: "This notice should be read in conjunction with:   Merchant Shipping (Maritime Labour Convention) (Minimum Requirements for Seafarers etc.) Regulations 2014 Merchant Shipping (Maritime Labour Convention) (Recruitment and Placement) Regulations 2014 MSN 1845 (M) Maritime Labour Convention, 2006 Food and Catering: Provision of food and fresh water  MSN 1844 (M) Maritime Labour Convention, 2006: Crew Accommodation  Annex A, attached separately alongside this notice, outlining the MLC, 2006 amendments 2022   This MIN expires on the 30 April 2026.  Notice to   shipowners ship operators and ship managers employers of seafarers masters officers and seafarers on sea-going ships ordinarily engaged in commercial operations P&I clubs recognised organisations recruitment and placement services maritime insurance providers  "

taxons.title: Safe and compliant operation of vessels
